data.title: TIAN RUIXIANG Unwinds Ren Talents Share Exchange, Cancels 3.2 Million Escrowed Shares
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings ( (TIRXF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings Ltd. and its wholly owned subsidiary VitaCare Limited entered into a Termination and Rescission Agreement with Ren Talents Inc., unwinding a November 4, 2025 share exchange that had been closed but remained executory because contingent consideration had not been finalized and the 3,211,010 TRX Class A shares stayed in escrow. The parties agreed to reverse the transaction ab initio by returning 100% of Ren Talents Inc.’s equity to the original sellers, cancelling all escrowed TRX shares back to authorized but unissued status, and mutually ring-fencing liabilities and delisting or compliance risks, a move that restores pre-deal balance sheets and clarifies that no further performance, earn-out or audit obligations will arise from the abandoned acquisition.

The agreement, which became effective upon execution and was disclosed in a Form 6-K filed on April 28, 2026, also provides for mutual releases of claims related to the original deal and sets out coordinated regulatory reporting in the U.S. and China. For investors, the rescission means TRX steps back from integrating Ren Talents Inc., avoids assuming its debts or litigation exposure, and preserves capital structure flexibility by eliminating the contingent share issuance, while the sellers are shielded from TRX’s own compliance and potential Nasdaq delisting risks.

Spark’s Take on TIRXF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TIRXF is a Neutral.

Tian Ruixiang Holdings’ overall stock score is primarily impacted by its financial performance and technical analysis. The company faces significant profitability challenges, and technical indicators suggest bearish momentum. Valuation metrics are poor, with a negative P/E ratio and no dividend yield, further weighing down the score.

To see Spark’s full report on TIRXF stock, click here.

More about TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings

TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings Ltd. is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed on Nasdaq, operating through subsidiaries including British Virgin Islands–based VitaCare Limited. The group is headquartered in Beijing, China, and is positioned as a foreign private issuer under U.S. securities regulations, filing periodic reports with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Luda Technology Group Delays Annual SEC Filing
data.description:
Luda Technology Group Limited ( (LUD) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Luda Technology Group Limited has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors that it will delay its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company is listed under SEC file number 001-42289 and is required to submit an annual Form 20-F (Yearly Report) as a foreign private issuer.

The company cites the need for additional time to review its financial statements as the sole reason for the delay. It does not mention auditor changes, internal control failures, regulatory investigations or any external disruptions, suggesting the issue is primarily timing and internal review workload.

Under the relief provisions of Rule 12b-25, Luda Technology Group Limited expects to file its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) within the standard fifteen-calendar-day extension window. With the original deadline of April 30, 2026, this implies an expected filing on or before mid-May 2026, barring unforeseen complications.

The company states that it does not anticipate any significant change in its results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year. That means investors should not, based on this notice alone, expect major surprises in earnings, though actual results will only be confirmed when the Form 20-F (Yearly Report) is filed and all standard forward-looking uncertainties still apply.

Luda Technology Group Limited confirms that all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed, signaling ongoing baseline compliance with SEC reporting rules. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer Ma Biu on April 29, 2026, underscoring management’s formal commitment to complete the filing within the allowed extension.

More about Luda Technology Group Limited

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

An update from Capitol Federal Financial ( (CFFN) ) is now available.

For the quarter ended March 31, 2026, Capitol Federal Financial reported total assets of $9.83 billion, stockholders’ equity of $1.03 billion, and net income of $20.1 million, marking a seventh consecutive quarter of net interest income and margin expansion. The bank posted a net interest margin of 2.24%, basic and diluted EPS of $0.16, an improved efficiency ratio of 52.45%, and maintained its operating expense ratio, while growing commercial loans and deposits and paying $15.9 million in dividends, including a special dividend in January 2026.

Commercial loans rose by $39.1 million in the quarter and have grown at a 19.1% annualized pace since September 30, 2025, with commercial deposits up $20.4 million in the quarter and 15.7% annualized since that date, underscoring the strategic shift toward full-service commercial banking. Management continued to return capital through $22.4 million of share repurchases between January 1 and April 22, 2026, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.085 per share on April 28, 2026, while advancing technology-driven initiatives in treasury management, digital onboarding, cards, and wealth management to strengthen funding, fee income, and long-term stockholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (CFFN) stock is a Hold with a $7.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Capitol Federal Financial stock, see the CFFN Stock Forecast page.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Mixed Martial Arts Group ( (MMA) ).

On April 29, 2026, Mixed Martial Arts Group Limited announced that its TrainAlta training program had gone live in five UFC GYM locations in Australia, marking the platform’s first international rollout beyond North America. TrainAlta is now operating at UFC GYM sites in Sydney CBD, Macarthur Square, Wetherill Park, Woolooware and Bankstown, extending its structured, coach-led martial arts curriculum into a market with a strong combat sports culture.

The move builds on TrainAlta’s deployment across UFC GYM North America since 2023 and is positioned as a key milestone in scaling MMA.INC’s programming layer across a global gym network. By adding more standardized, repeatable training activity into its ecosystem, MMA.INC aims to deepen member engagement, enhance data visibility on user behavior and reinforce long-term monetization opportunities linked to participation, retention, loyalty and rewards, complementing accelerating usage metrics such as 216,000 training check-ins recorded in Q1 2026.

More about Mixed Martial Arts Group

Mixed Martial Arts Group Limited, which trades as MMA.INC on the NYSE American, operates a technology-driven ecosystem serving the global combat sports and martial arts industry. Through assets including TrainAlta, BJJLink, Hype and MixedMartialArts.com, it connects more than 5 million social followers, 530,000 user profiles and 75,000+ active students across 18,000 published gyms in 22 countries.

data.description:

Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) has shared an announcement.

Braskem has called an extraordinary general meeting for May 28, 2026, to be held exclusively in digital format via the Webex platform, and has issued a detailed shareholder participation manual in line with Brazilian CVM Resolution 81. The company aims to facilitate remote engagement through ballots, digital access procedures, and specific documentation rules for both local shareholders and ADR holders.

On the agenda, Braskem proposes an extensive reformulation and consolidation of its bylaws to align with a new shareholders’ agreement disclosed on April 23, 2026, and to formalize updated governance structures and board committees. Shareholders will also vote on synchronizing the executive board’s term with the board of directors, electing new board members, and replacing members of the fiscal council, signaling a broad governance refresh with potential implications for oversight and strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Sell with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Merlin ( (MRLN) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 29, 2026, Merlin, Inc. announced it had entered into a private investment in public equity agreement with an existing institutional shareholder to raise $80 million through the sale of 8 million common shares at $10 each and warrants for 4 million additional shares. The transaction, structured as a private placement exempt from U.S. securities registration requirements, is expected to close around May 1, 2026 and will trigger anti-dilution adjustments to the company’s existing convertible preferred stock and certain warrants.

The financing will lift Merlin’s total cash resources to about $183 million and is intended to accelerate revenue generation and long-term value creation, including advancing its core autonomous flight platform, funding regulatory approvals and scaling program capacity. The updated registration rights arrangements commit Merlin to register the resale of the new shares and warrant shares, bolstering liquidity for investors, while the investment deepens the relationship with a long-term shareholder and reinforces Merlin’s balance sheet as it pursues 2026–2027 program milestones and its commercial launch timeline.

The most recent analyst rating on (MRLN) stock is a Buy with a $25.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Merlin stock, see the MRLN Stock Forecast page.

More about Merlin

Merlin, Inc. is a U.S.-based aerospace technology company specializing in cost-effective, takeoff-to-touchdown autonomous flight systems for both legacy and next-generation aircraft. Its aircraft-agnostic, AI-powered software serves military and civil programs, supporting a growing range of missions and platforms and backed by more than $100 million in awarded military contracts.

The company focuses on assured, autonomous flight technology that addresses national security challenges while enabling commercial applications. Its systems have been validated through hundreds of autonomous flights at test facilities worldwide, positioning Merlin as a leading player in defense-related autonomy and emerging commercial autonomous aviation markets.

data.title: Coca-Cola FEMSA Posts Mixed 1Q26 Results, Approves 2025 Dividend and Expands Sustainability Reporting
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Coca Cola Femsa SAB De CV ( (KOF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

In the first quarter of 2026, Coca-Cola FEMSA reported modest top-line growth, with volumes up 1.2% and revenues rising 1.1% (6.0% on a currency-neutral basis), while operating income declined 2.3% and majority net income fell 15.5% due mainly to higher financing costs. The quarter highlighted a sharp divergence between regions, as Mexico and Central America faced softer demand, an excise tax-driven volume and mix hit, and a 17.4% drop in operating income, partly offset by strong growth in South America where operating income rose 18.8% and margin strength helped stabilize consolidated profitability.

On March 24, 2026, shareholders approved 2025 financial statements, board appointments, and a dividend of Ps. 7.74 per unit to be paid in four installments, with the first Ps. 0.241875 per-share tranche of Ps. 4,065.1 million paid on April 21, 2026. The company also released its 2025 integrated annual report with enhanced sustainability disclosures, including early adoption of IFRS S1/S2, TNFD-aligned reporting, and progress on water use, PET collection, renewable electricity, safety, and gender diversity, underscoring a strategic emphasis on ESG performance and long-term competitiveness.

The most recent analyst rating on (KOF) stock is a Hold with a $117.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Coca Cola Femsa SAB De CV stock, see the KOF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KOF Stock

The score is driven primarily by solid operating fundamentals (strong revenue momentum and steady profitability) but is held back by the sharp 2025 cash-flow deterioration and cautious 2026 outlook risks (Mexico volume pressure, margin/input-cost headwinds, higher financing costs). Technicals remain weak despite oversold signals, while valuation is supportive due to the mid-teens P/E and ~3.7% dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on KOF stock, click here.

More about Coca Cola Femsa SAB De CV

Coca-Cola FEMSA, S.A.B. de C.V. is the largest Coca-Cola franchise bottler in the world by sales volume, operating primarily in Mexico, Central America, and South America. The company produces, markets, and distributes non-alcoholic beverages, including soft drinks and other Coca-Cola trademark products, with a focus on leveraging a diversified geographic footprint across key Latin American markets.

data.title: JinkoSolar Narrows Losses and Surpasses 400 GW in Cumulative Shipments in Q1 2026
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from JinkoSolar ( (JKS) ) is now available.

JinkoSolar reported unaudited results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, showing total module shipments of about 13.7 GW and becoming the first manufacturer to surpass 400 GW of cumulative solar module deliveries, including roughly 240 GW from its Tiger Neo line. The company’s Tiger Neo 3.0 modules reached 655–660 W, high-power products above 640 W rose to nearly a quarter of shipments, and energy storage deliveries surged to around 1.42 GWh, underscoring its push into higher-value overseas and ESS markets.

Financially, first-quarter revenue fell 30.0% sequentially and 11.5% year over year to RMB12.25 billion as module volumes declined, but gross profit jumped to RMB1.02 billion and margin improved to 8.3%, reversing losses seen in 2025. Net loss narrowed to RMB463.5 million and operating losses shrank sharply as higher module prices, a better product mix and lower operating expenses took hold, while management guided to 14–16 GW of module shipments in the second quarter and 75–85 GW for full-year 2026, with high-efficiency products expected to exceed 60% of volume and integrated capacity targeted at about 100 GW by year-end.

The most recent analyst rating on (JKS) stock is a Hold with a $23.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on JinkoSolar stock, see the JKS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on JKS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, JKS is a Neutral.

JinkoSolar’s overall stock score reflects a cautious outlook. The most significant factor is the financial performance, which shows declining profitability and high leverage. Technical analysis provides a slightly positive outlook, while the valuation is concerning due to a negative P/E ratio. The earnings call offers some optimism with strategic shifts and operational achievements, but challenges remain.

To see Spark’s full report on JKS stock, click here.

More about JinkoSolar

JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. is a China-based global leader in clean energy technology, specializing in high-efficiency solar modules and integrated solar-plus-storage solutions. The NYSE-listed company focuses heavily on overseas markets, with more than 80% of its module shipments exported and an expanding footprint in distributed solar and energy storage systems worldwide.

data.title: Galapagos Shareholders Approve Name Change to Lakefront Biotherapeutics and Broad Governance Overhaul
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Galapagos ( (GLPG) ) has provided an announcement.

On 28 April 2026, Galapagos NV held its Annual and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meetings, where investors approved the 2025 annual and remuneration reports, discharged directors and the auditor from liability, and confirmed a broad refresh of the board with the appointment of CEO Henry Gosebruch as executive director and several new independent and non-executive directors. Shareholders also reappointed the statutory auditor and mandated it to provide assurance on the company’s CSRD sustainability reporting, underlining an increased focus on governance and non-financial disclosure.

At the Extraordinary Meeting the company’s owners backed a name change to “Lakefront Biotherapeutics,” effective 8 May 2026, authorized the board to repurchase shares, and renewed authorized capital by up to 20% of existing share capital, giving management more financial and strategic flexibility. The governance overhaul and new capital tools are intended to support Galapagos’ ongoing transformation and next growth phase, with incoming chair Gino Santini expected to play a key role in executing the strategy and balancing patient impact with sustainable shareholder returns.

GCL Global Holdings ( (GCL) ) has issued an update.

In April 2026, GCL Global Holdings Ltd. partially redeemed approximately $3.18 million of its outstanding senior convertible notes originally issued under a May 21, 2025 Securities Purchase Agreement, and exchanged the remaining balance for a warrant to purchase 1,125,000 ordinary shares at an initial exercise price of $8.00 per share. data.description:

Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) has provided an announcement.

Braskem S.A. has called an extraordinary general meeting to be held digitally on May 28, 2026, as it advances a shareholding transaction disclosed in material facts dated April 20 and 23. The company plans broad amendments to its bylaws to align with a new shareholders’ agreement, refine corporate governance rules for the general meeting, Board of Directors and Executive Board, and formally embed several key board committees, including finance, strategy, people and safety, into its statutes.

Shareholders will also vote on consolidating the restated bylaws, authorizing an early end to the current Executive Board term so its new two-year mandate coincides with the Board elected at the April 29, 2026 AGM, electing a new Board of Directors, and replacing members of the Fiscal Council. The meeting will be held exclusively via Webex, with participation allowed either through remote voting ballots or direct access to the digital platform, and shareholders must submit ownership and identification documents in advance under Brazil’s CVM Resolution 81, underscoring the company’s shift toward fully digital, procedure-heavy governance.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Sell with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Frontier Nuclear Highlights Kadmos Energy’s Dual Validation Push for SMR Licensing
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Frontier Nuclear and Minerals ( (FNUC) ) has issued an update.

On April 29, 2026, Frontier Nuclear and Minerals said its portfolio company Kadmos Energy Services launched a dual experimental validation program to underpin its small modular reactor design and U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission licensing strategy. The effort, built around two purpose-built test beds for thermal-hydraulic performance and containment safety, is intended to generate high‑fidelity data that de-risks licensing, accelerates development timelines and supports Kadmos’ push into data center, industrial and defense power markets, potentially enhancing value for Frontier’s investors and strengthening its position in next‑generation nuclear power.

Kadmos’ SMR concept uses a below‑grade pressurized water reactor with passive safety features and leverages proven light‑water technology and existing supply chains to reduce technological and regulatory risk. By advancing engineering, testing and licensing in parallel and targeting initial commercial operations in the early 2030s, Kadmos is seeking a capital‑efficient path to deployment that could differentiate it from rival SMR developers and reinforce Frontier Nuclear’s broader nuclear fuel cycle strategy.

More about Frontier Nuclear and Minerals

Frontier Nuclear and Minerals Inc., doing business as Frontier Nuclear, is a nuclear fuel cycle company focused on building a U.S.-based platform through uranium exploration and development, alongside targeted investments in enrichment and reactor technologies. The company aims to position itself across the nuclear fuel value chain, evaluating opportunities that align with its long-term strategy to supply secure, carbon-free energy solutions.

data.title: Akanda Corp. Adjourns Quorum-Short Special Shareholder Meeting to May 25
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Akanda Corp ( (AKAN) ) has issued an update.

Akanda Corp. convened a special meeting of shareholders in Toronto on April 27, 2026, but was forced to adjourn without conducting any business because the required quorum was not met. The Nasdaq-listed company will reconvene the meeting on May 25, 2026, keeping the same record date of February 26, 2026, so only shareholders of record on that date remain eligible to vote.

The adjournment underscores ongoing shareholder engagement challenges, with the company using the extra month to solicit additional proxies to reach the minimum threshold of two shareholders representing at least 10% of outstanding voting shares. Previously submitted proxies will carry over to the reconvened meeting unless revoked, and Akanda is urging investors to vote promptly to avoid further delays in its corporate decision-making.

More about Akanda Corp

Akanda Corp. is a Canada-based company that, through cannabis-focused subsidiaries, cultivates and distributes high-quality cannabis and wellness products with a global consumer focus. It also controls First Towers & Fiber Corp., an emerging Mexican telecommunications infrastructure developer specializing in cellular towers and dark fiber networks for national carriers and technology providers.

First Towers & Fiber aims to deliver scalable, reliable connectivity solutions that support commercial expansion and digital inclusion in Mexico. Akanda positions itself at the intersection of regulated cannabis markets and digital infrastructure growth, targeting both health-oriented consumers and telecom partners in developing markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell
